changeSet.author: mironov.rs
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE training ( training_id INT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, course_name VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL, start_date DATE, end_date DATE, status VARCHAR(50), organization VARCHAR(150) NOT NULL, employee_id BIGINT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT FK_training_employee FOREIGN KEY (employee_id) REFERENCES employee(employee_id) ON DELETE CASCADE );
